hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs manage ADGM-specific regulatory workflows by unifying onboarding, Travel Rule operations, rule monitoring, case management, and audit evidence into one compliant system.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance operations slow without unified workflows
problem_description: VASPs operating under ADGM face fragmented compliance checks from multiple providers that slow onboarding and risk review processes. This disconnection creates gaps in audit evidence and complicates regulatory reporting across jurisdiction-specific rules.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies provider outputs, jurisdictional rules, onboarding checks, case management and regulatory reporting into one operational layer tailored for ADGM VASPs to accelerate reviews and maintain clear audit evidence.
workflow_title: From provider checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY connects ADGM-specific KYC, KYB, Travel Rule and screening results into structured workflows supporting case review, decision logging, evidence preservation and regulatory reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects jurisdiction-specific regulatory rules with provider outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions, evidence and reports for clearer ADGM VASP compliance control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing ADGM-specific workflows with structured provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and controlled deployment for stronger operational governance.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for ADGM VASP compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps VASPs meet ADGM compliance by connecting provider outputs, jurisdictional rules, case workflows and evidence into one structured operational layer tailored for ADGM requirements.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support ADGM Travel Rule workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY manages ADGM Travel Rule workflows by routing originator and beneficiary data, tracking message status, handling exceptions and linking events to case and evidence records.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve compliance audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit evidence including decision logs, case history, provider results and regulatory change records to support review readiness under ADGM supervisory expectations.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing ADGM compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers while providing controlled role-based access, audit logs and secure workflow orchestration for ADGM compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace ADGM KYC or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No, SFTY does not replace KYC, Travel Rule or screening providers but connects and structures their outputs into auditable workflows, evidence and reports for ADGM VASP compliance.
final_title: Structure ADGM VASP compliance operations clearly
final_description: Review how SFTY connects onboarding, Travel Rule events, rules monitoring and case management for ADGM jurisdiction workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
